CAREERS
JOIN OUR TEAM
THANK YOU FOR YOUR INTEREST IN JOINING THE TEAM AT THE DR. PETER CENTRE! 

 

We offer a flexible working environment and the opportunity to work with a leading-edge group of dedicated professionals to enhance the lives of people living with HIV and AIDS in Metro Vancouver.

 

If you have suitable qualifications and experience for any of the following positions, please send your resume and cover letter to humanresources@drpeter.org.

 
Dr. Peter Centre is proud to be a Living Wage Employer, part of our broader organizational commitment to the humanity at the core of our work.

 

 

Current Employment Opportunities:

Charge Nurse - Residence (Regular Full Time)

Counsellor - (Temporary FT)

Counsellor - (Casual)

LPN - (Temporary FT)

Music Therapist - Day Health (Casual)

Nurse Practitioner - Day Health & Residence (Regular Full Time)

Recreation Therapist - Day Health (Casual)

Social Worker - (Temporary FT)
